search_document:
User Request: Customers with the most orders.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Monthly Orders Trend
Type: chart
Description: Trend of orders placed each month
Title: Top Customers by Orders
Type: table
Description: Customers with the highest number of orders
Title: Total Orders
Type: kpi
Description: Total number of orders placed

sql_queries.title: Monthly Orders Trend
sql_queries.description: Trend of orders placed each month
sql_queries.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', OrderDate) AS OrderMonth, COUNT(OrderID) AS OrderCount FROM Orders GROUP BY OrderMonth ORDER BY OrderMonth

sql_queries.title: Top Customers by Orders
sql_queries.description: Customers with the highest number of orders
sql_queries.sql: SELECT Customers.CustomerID, Customers.CompanyName, COUNT(Orders.OrderID) AS OrderCount FROM Customers JOIN Orders ON Customers.CustomerID = Orders.CustomerID GROUP BY Customers.CustomerID, Customers.CompanyName ORDER BY OrderCount DESC LIMIT 10

sql_queries.title: Total Orders
sql_queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(OrderID) AS TotalOrders FROM Orders
